id.description: Unique identifier for the configured dataset.

name.description: The name of the performance dataset. If a name is not specified then a default name is assigned. The default name will be an underscore separated list of the performance metrics and filters used to configure the dataset.

statkey.description: Key for use in viewing associated raw statistics under the endpoints /statistics/history and /statistics/current.

stats_summary_uri.description: URI used to view associated summary statistics.
